note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Right lower leg measures aprx 1.7 x 2.0cm, depth 0.4cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 1.0x1.2, 0.2cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 1.7x2.0x0.4cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 56% gran, 44% slough. Periwound intact. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Morales notified.
